rationale: Review 2 surfaces the real bundling violation on AffineAlgGroup (explicit in diff lines 34-36 and contrary to the quoted roadmap directive) plus the same premature Layer 5/6 True-stubs/IsUnipotent as Review 1; acting on it produces a PR whose Layer-0 foundations also comply with project rules whereas Review 1 would leave the bundling untouched. Both correctly identify the scope mismatch of including the Layer-6 stubs, but only Review 2 catches the additional grounded defect.
